description_long: This object is a standard cylindrical beverage can, commonly found as street litter in urban environments. The can is uniformly dark in color, with a smooth metallic surface that reflects light subtly, indicating a hard, metal exterior. The top features a slightly recessed circular lid with a visible pull tab, typical of aluminum drink cans. There are no visible brand logos, text, or decorative elements, giving it a generic, unbranded appearance. The can appears undamaged, with no dents, rust, or scratches visible on its surface. Its size and proportions are consistent with a typical 330ml or 355ml soda can.
description: A generic, dark-colored cylindrical beverage can with a smooth metallic surface and a standard pull tab on top. The can is unbranded and undamaged.
description_view_0: Front view showing the can's cylindrical body and the top with a visible pull tab.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing more of the can's top and subtle highlights on the metallic surface.
description_view_2: Rear view of the can, showing the smooth, featureless body and the top edge.
description_view_3: Side view with the pull tab partially visible and the can's uniform surface apparent.
